56673.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
56673.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV!
